_meta.note: Addendum to swap-01: Bvlgari Man In Black Essence was verified discontinued in the cut-audit research (limited edition, secondary market only) but was accidentally omitted from the cut-audit-01/swap-01 files. Covered by Joseph's blanket approval of the dead-product cuts, executed here with disclosure.

replacement.name: Man in Black
replacement.description: Boozy rum and spice over leather and warm benzoin. Dark, plush and the reason this line has a devoted following.
